name: cubicweb-editorjs

modules.name: cubicweb_editorjs
documentation:
cubicweb-editorjs application package

Add editorjs format for RichString

functions.name: cubicweb_editorjs.use_editorjs
documentation:
return True if editor.js should be used to edit entity's attribute named
`attr`

functions.name: cubicweb_editorjs.printable_value
documentation:
return a displayable value (i.e. unicode string) which may contains
html tags

classes.name: cubicweb_editorjs.EditorJS
documentation:
EditorJS enabled <textarea>, will return a unicode string containing
HTML formated text.
